label: 区域块切
description: 对输入区域的外接矩形做两层随机退缩雕刻，得到不规则但贴合 bbox 的 blocky 子区域：第一层加权采样四向退缩量得到内框，第二层在内框边缘按段做 inward/outward 偏移制造起伏，最后等比缩回原 bbox。可用于建筑占地、街区轮廓、地块切片等任意需要「方块感的不规则形状」场景。
description-en: Carves a bounding-box-fitting blocky sub-region from the input region in two layers: layer 1 samples per-side setbacks to define an inner rectangle; layer 2 perturbs each side segment-by-segment with inward/outward offsets; the result is then proportionally rescaled to the original bbox. Useful for building footprints, block outlines, and any irregular shape with a blocky feel.
icon: 深色背景上一个圆角矩形被两层退缩雕刻成不规则形状，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 输入区域
inputs.description: 0/1 网格；雕刻基于其外接矩形。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 grid; carving operates on its bounding box.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间。

outputs.name: region
outputs.label: 雕刻区域
outputs.description: 雕刻后的 0/1 区域网格，与输入同形状。
outputs.description-en: Carved 0/1 region grid; same shape as the input.
